'''makusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wharfside|wharfside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wharfside|wharfside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| makusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mækisith|mækisith]] || [[word:mækisij|mækisij]] || [[word:mækisish|mækisish]] || [[word:mækisi|mækisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:makukusuth|makukusuth]] || [[word:makukusuj|makukusuj]] || [[word:makukusush|makukusush]] || [[word:makukusu|makukusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:makusuth|makusuth]] || [[word:makusuj|makusuj]] || [[word:makusush|makusush]] || [[word:makusu|makusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:makufsuth|makufsuth]] || [[word:makufsuj|makufsuj]] || [[word:makufsush|makufsush]] || [[word:makufsuf|makufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:makusuthu|makusuthu]] || [[word:makusuju|makusuju]] || [[word:makusushu|makusushu]] || [[word:makusuku|makusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:makusuth|makusuth]] || [[word:makusuj|makusuj]] || [[word:makusush|makusush]] || [[word:makusu|makusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:makusuthul|makusuthul]] || [[word:makusujul|makusujul]] || [[word:makusushul|makusushul]] || [[word:makusukul|makusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:makusuthuthu|makusuthuthu]] || [[word:makusujuju|makusujuju]] || [[word:makusushushu|makusushushu]] || [[word:makusuku|makusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:makusuthun|makusuthun]] || [[word:makusujun|makusujun]] || [[word:makusushun|makusushun]] || [[word:makusukun|makusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:makusuthuoro|makusuthuoro]] || [[word:makusujuoro|makusujuoro]] || [[word:makusushuoro|makusushuoro]] || [[word:makusukuoro|makusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
